subject: Your System Design roundup is here, Денис
body:
See this week's Educative Newsletter + LangChain course updates

* Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис,

With your Educative account, you get free access to The Educative Newsletter. Here is this week's System Design edition:

-

In addition, we just updated our popular LangChain course:

-

Unleash the Power of Large Language Models Using LangChain (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/MWxlP1mcNrQW8sX3vr7nWSmpW3GjFly5LtmWsN5q1hkH3prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3mwW5QpXSn4QVy43N5pZ00v4HqrBW3K1wg958ZXk-W6M97y58_NkbMVfR9fy7Ptx5nW5NYFMB3Wq_4vW7LtQB07-qqFkW8vKPs31mWq5FW1Ll8WB2k2k77W3dGDPV8hF8bqW3XBnTt94gtMPW2ck0355qPKkgW6WTxc133bQ3RW4w97d_8Xkn8vW5LQCb763Cnz4N1W5Hf9VFwjfW33B3WB8Yld5zW3HNBFq6wM9F1VqHL5j2z4SSFW8XrD8l3kRR-HW5wjVRF25DGkyW11Qv6z84HmsmW1w2CFP4c8wkpW8nKBnd6K8XHWVv6qXd7Qs1clW7155KC8QyjvyW355HWf953hp0N91cXnXRPFQPf4yj9kq04 )

Please enjoy.
